meta.title: Summonware — Software, Summoned. AI-Forward Custom Builds
meta.description: Summonware is an AI-forward software house. Tell us the outcome — we summon the product: custom software, AI systems, and design that ships.

hero.description: Even one call is enough to start. Tell us the outcome you need — we summon the product: scoped, designed, and built with an AI-accelerated pipeline that never steals your quarter.
hero.introHtml: No dev team? Summonware gets your product built — even if all you have is an idea
hero.introSub: Scopes itself in days, looks right from the first screen, turns whatever you sketch into working software

promise.lead: Just bring the problem — we bring the team
promise.sub: Summonware shapes the scope, designs the experience, and turns your idea into a shipped product in weeks.

services.sub: Summonware isn't a single service. It's a complete system built around how you actually operate.

steps.name: ai-systems
steps.title: Turn a workflow into an AI engine
steps.text: We build agents and pipelines around your real operations. Describe the process once — then watch it run itself. Automate the grind, keep the judgment calls.

steps.name: custom-software
steps.title: Unlimited product, instantly scoped
steps.text: Great software without hiring and firefighting a dev org — or full control if you want it. Web apps, platforms, internal tools: clean architecture, yours to keep.

steps.name: product-design
steps.title: Design that sells before it ships
steps.text: Interfaces your customers actually enjoy — researched, prototyped, and tested. We design the journey first, so engineering builds the right thing once.

steps.name: launch-support
steps.title: Keep it alive after launch
steps.text: Monitoring, iteration, and growth features on a retainer that flexes with you. Your product keeps improving while you run the business.

trust.sub: Built to pass security review, not just sprint review.
trust.note: PLACEHOLDER — confirm each claim below is accurate before publishing. These describe process commitments, not certifications we currently hold unless stated.

cards.title: Data handled under PDPA
cards.body: Every project follows Thailand's Personal Data Protection Act from day one — data minimization, consent handling, and access logging built in, not bolted on.

cards.title: In-country hosting available
cards.body: Deploy on Thailand-based infrastructure when data residency is a requirement, not a preference.

cards.title: Security-reviewed delivery
cards.body: Every line ships through senior review, static analysis, and dependency audits before it reaches your repo.

cards.title: Formal engagement, your terms
cards.body: NDA, SOW, fixed-price or time-and-materials — we work inside your procurement process, not around it.

cards.title: Launching a startup
cards.lead: Idea → Summonware → MVP in market. Done.
specs: Senior-only team — no juniors on your bill

cards.title: Scaling a business
cards.lead: A senior team on tap while you grow revenue, not headcount.
specs: Our engineers inside your standups and repo

cards.title: Public sector & regulated enterprise
cards.lead: We work inside your procurement and compliance process — not around it.
specs: Security review and PDPA-aligned handling by default

start.copy: A formal discovery call to scope it. Fixed proposal within 5 business days. We work inside your procurement process — NDA available on request, no commitment until you see the plan.
start.success: Thank you — your request is in. We'll follow up within one business day to schedule the discovery call.

items.a: An AI-forward software house. We replace your need for an agency, a dev team, a design studio, and an AI consultancy — one partner that takes an idea to a shipped product with pro-level quality and AI-accelerated delivery built in.
Anyone with a product to build — from startups to SMEs to regulated enterprises and public-sector teams. We adapt the engagement to your process, whether that's a quick MVP or a formal RFP.

items.q: How is this different from a regular agency?
items.a: Most agencies just execute tickets. Summonware also scopes the product, designs the journey, wires in AI where it earns its keep, and stays for launch and growth. And it all comes from one senior team.

items.q: How does the AI-accelerated pipeline work?
items.a: Every task runs through our internal tooling built on frontier models — code generation, review, test synthesis, and docs. Humans make the calls; the pipeline removes the grind. You get senior output at roughly twice the pace.
First working demo in about two weeks including scoping and design. The discovery-to-proposal step itself is around five business days.

items.q: Will the AI affect my code quality or compliance posture?
items.a: Unreviewed AI code tends to be verbose and brittle — so ours never ships unreviewed. Every line passes senior review, tests, and static analysis before it reaches your repo, the same standard we'd expect for a regulated client.

footer.heading: Any questions?
footer.stack: stack — typescript · python · react · three.js · claude api
